videoSnippet.title: This is The Game You're Looking For! || Nodirbek vs Jorden || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2751) - Van Foreest, Jorden (2705)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [07] 2026.03.04
B35 Sicilian, accelerated fianchetto, modern variation with Bc4

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Nc3 g6 4.d4 cxd4 5.Nxd4 Bg7 6.Be3 Nf6 7.Bc4 O-O 8.Bb3 a5 9.O-O a4 10.Nxa4 Nxe4 11.Nb5 d5 12.Bb6 Qd7 13.Qe2 e6 14.Rad1 Ne5 15.Bd4 Ra5 16.Nbc3 Nxc3 17.Bxc3 Qc7 18.Rfe1 Bd7 19.Bxa5 Qxa5 20.Nc3 b5 21.h3 Nc4 22.Nxd5 exd5 23.Rxd5 Nb6 24.Rd6 Bf5 25.c3 Nc4 26.Bxc4 bxc4 27.Qxc4 Be6 28.Rdxe6 fxe6 29.Rxe6 Kh8 30.a4 Qf5 31.Qe2 Qb1+ 32.Kh2 Qf5 33.Re4 h5 34.Kg1 Kh7 35.Qe1 Rf7 36.h4 Rd7 37.g3 Qf3 38.Re3 Qg4 39.Qe2 Qxa4 40.Kg2 Qc6+ 41.Qf3 Qb5 42.Re6 Qxb2 43.Rxg6 Kxg6 44.Qc6+ Bf6
